if end&1 == 1: res = self.segFunc(res, self.seg[end]) end -= 1

for i, c in enumerate(s): alp[ord(c) - ord("a")][i] = 1
seg = [SegTree(0, alp[i]) for i in range(26)]

for _ in range(q): a, b, c = map(str, input().split()) if a == "1": b = int(b) - 1 for i in range(26): if alp[i][b] == 1: alp[i][b] = 0 seg[i].update(b, 0) alp[ord(c) - ord("a")][b] = 1 seg[ord(c) - ord("a")].update(b, 1) else: b, c = int(b)-1, int(c) cnt = 0 for i in range(26): if seg[i].query(b, c) > 0: cnt += 1 ans.append(cnt)

if a == "1": b = int(b) - 1 for i in range(26): if alp[i][b] == 1: alp[i][b] = 0 seg[i].update(b, 0) alp[ord(c) - ord("a")][b] = 1 seg[ord(c) - ord("a")].update(b, 1) else: b, c = int(b)-1, int(c) cnt = 0 for i in range(26): if seg[i].query(b, c) > 0: cnt += 1 ans.append(cnt)
for i in range(26): if alp[i][b] == 1: alp[i][b] = 0 seg[i].update(b, 0)
for i in range(26): if seg[i].query(b, c) > 0: cnt += 1
